title: justicia boerhaaviifolia
intro: Justicia boerhaaviifolia, also known as the Boerhavia or Korantengi, is a perennial plant species native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Justicia boerhaaviifolia include treating fever, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
